sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: What people usually ask about using Spellvault as an MTG collection tracker.

items.title: What does an MTG collection tracker do?
items.description: It helps you keep card inventory, collection structure, and value organized in one place.

items.title: Can I track decks and binders?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is built for real collection setups, including decks, binders, boxes, and lists.

items.title: Can I manage large collections?
items.description: Yes. The bigger the collection, the more useful it is to keep everything searchable and structured.

items.title: Does Spellvault help with duplicates?
items.description: Yes. Tracking duplicates is one of the easiest ways to understand what you can trade or sell.
